name: Lead agrees to schedule a call

input.yourMessage: Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week to see if we can help?
input.replyMessage: Yes, that sounds good. I'm free Tuesday afternoon.

input.yourMessage: We help teams automate LinkedIn outreach with better reply handling.
input.replyMessage: Interesting — can you share more about how it works?

input.yourMessage: I'd love to show you how we help sales teams book more meetings.
input.replyMessage: Thanks, but we're not looking for anything right now.

input.yourMessage: Following up on my note from last week.
input.replyMessage: Please remove me from your list.

input.yourMessage: Would a quick demo be useful for your team?
Happy to walk through pricing if helpful.
input.replyMessage: Sure, send me a couple of times for next week.

conversation.text: Hi Jordan — we help B2B teams respond to LinkedIn replies faster.
What does pricing look like for a small team?
Happy to walk through pricing if helpful.
Sure, send me a couple of times for next week.
